rationale: Section 31.03 governs split-payment timing and mechanics. Increasing the homestead exemption amount under §11.13(b) affects tax calculation but does not alter, contradict, or require amendment to split-payment provisions.
quote: The governing body of a taxing unit that collects its own taxes may provide, in the manner required by law for official action by the body, that a person who pays one-half of the taxing unit's taxes before December 1
_note: No conflict. §31.03 addresses payment timing, not exemption amounts.
